question: The book of Obadiah is introduced as a _________ (Obad 1)
What group is the book of Obadiah about (Obad 1)?
What did the envoy sent to the nations say (Obad 1)?
options: Rise, and let us go against her for battle
Go into the hill country of and hunt them down

question: What does the Lord say had deceived Edom (Obad 3)?
options: The hatred of the people of God

question: What do the Edomites say to themselves (Obad 3)?
options: Who can bring me down to the ground?
Who can subdue the heights of Edom?
Who can withstand the hosts of Edom?

question: How does God describe Edom picturing themselves (Obad 4)?
options: As a deer on the rocky crags

question: From where does God say he will bring Edom down (Obad 4)?
options: From their nest among the stars

question: Who does God suggest would come against Edom at night (Obad 5)?
What would grape pickers who came to Edom normally do (Obad 5)?
options: Drink some of the new wine

question: Who is Edom the descendant of (Obad 6)?
Who will deceive and overpower Edom (Obad 7)?
Who will set a trap for Edom (Obad 7)?
Who does the Lord say he will destroy from Edom in that day (Obad 8)?
options: The kings and officials of Edom

question: From where will the men of understanding of Edom be destroyed (Obad 8)?
Whose warriors will be terrified (Obad 9)?
Why will Edom be covered with shame (Obad 10)?
options: Because of their violence against Jacob
Because they worshipped the gods of Ammon
Because they defiled the God of Israel

question: What did foreigners do to Jerusalem as Edom was like one of them (Obad 11)?
When did Edom boast (Obad 12)?
options: In the day the temple was plundered
In the day of Jacob’s trouble
On the day Jacob was exiled

question: Where should Edom not have marched (Obad 13)?
options: Through the gates of God’s people

question: Why did Edom wait at the crossroads (Obad 14)?
options: To set a trap for Judah
To provide wine for Israel’s enemies
To control the entrances into Judah

question: What did Edom do to the survivors in the day of their trouble (Obad 14)?
What did Edom do on God’s holy hill (Obad 15)?
What will be on Mount Zion (Obad 17)?
Ultimately Zion will be ______ (Obad 17)
If the house of Jacob is a fire what will the house of Esau be (Obad 18)?
What will not be left from the house of Esau (Obad 18)?
Who will occupy the mountains of Esau (Obad 19)?
What will go up on Mount Zion (Obad 21)?
What will the deliverers on Mount Zion do (Obad 21)?
options: Pull down the walls of Teman

question: What will be the Lord’s (Obad 21)?
